creator: michael.scheidell@secnap.com
text:
ports maintainers: please close this one..  I am going to open new one 
with patches that fix ../configure problems, including getting python to 
work.

issue was cookies in firefox. erase cookies all is fine.
REAL FIX would be to look for old cookies and deal with them, but life 
is too short.

this should be documented in case someone comes here looking for a fix.

--
